evidence.source_title: 2016 Iranian Assembly of Experts election — Wikipedia
evidence.description: The 2016 Assembly of Experts election was held during Ali Khamenei's tenure as Supreme Leader. The Assembly of Experts holds constitutional authority to appoint, supervise, and dismiss the Supreme Leader; the cohort elected in 2016 later convened in March 2026 to select Khamenei's successor.

editorial_notes: Khamenei is materially relevant to the 2016 AoE election as the Supreme Leader being supervised by the elected body, and whose succession was decided by members elected in this election.
